evals.prompt: 我要在 DAYU200 上跑 multimodalinput 系统测试二进制，需要权限、编译、部署、运行和 hidumper 分阶段抓取。请给出执行顺序和关键注意点。
evals.expected_output: Produces a parameterized device-test workflow covering token setup, temporary server bypass, compile/deploy/run, phase-based hidumper capture, and cleanup.
expectations: The response requires InitNativeToken before any InputManager call.
The response marks server-side bypasses as temporary local validation changes and requires restore after testing.
The response uses placeholders for device serial, host, user, port, and credentials instead of real environment values.
The response uses phase-based hidumper capture with matching phase file paths and enough sleep or polling time.
The response warns about hdc shell quoting and splits complex commands when needed.

evals.prompt: 测试完成后我要整理报告。哪些环境信息不能写进 skill 或 eval 结果？
evals.expected_output: Rejects leaking real device or jump-host identifiers and keeps public artifacts parameterized.
expectations: The response forbids real passwords, hostnames, usernames, and device serial numbers in public skill artifacts.
The response uses placeholders such as <device_serial>, <host>, <user>, and <port>.
The response keeps Windows jump-host usage as one parameterized option rather than a hard requirement.
The response distinguishes local run evidence from reusable skill instructions.
